candidates.why: Best top-line revenue/sales line; 'Other operating revenue' is non-core and the 'Other Operating Income - Total (Non-revenue)' label explicitly says non-revenue.
Operating income item but not the main sales/revenue line.
Explicitly labeled non-revenue, so not appropriate for REVT.

variables.notes: Selected the main sales line as revenue.

candidates.why: Only row in the income statement that looks like a direct cost of goods/services line; other nearby expense rows appear to be overhead.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Candidate list was empty. Chose 'Merchandise' from the full preview because it most closely matches direct product/service cost, but the label is not explicit like 'Cost of sales' or 'COGS'.

candidates.why: Likely operating overhead bucket; not a total/subtotal and not D&A/finance/tax.
Classic SG&A/overhead component.
Also an overhead personnel-related component, though preview values are empty.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal line exists. Selected overhead component rows and excluded COGS ('Merchandise'), D&A, finance, taxes, and totals.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: This refers to amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense, so it should be excluded from XRD.

variables.notes: No clear current-period research & development expense line is present. The candidate is amortization, which should be excluded from XRD.

candidates.why: Most semantically correct interest-expense label; use as top priority even though preview values are empty.
Broader finance-cost line; acceptable fallback if no specific interest expense is populated.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific interest component, but narrower than total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease-interest only; narrower and less preferred.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Priority list for a single reported interest line over time. Preferred explicit 'Interest Expense', then broader 'Finance costs', then lease-interest as a narrower fallback.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders of the Parent
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line and excludes non-controlling interests, which avoids double counting with MIB.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred when a parent-equity line exists.
Income statement item, not book equity.
Balancing item, not an actual equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing item, not equity.
Total balance sheet size, not book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders of the Parent

variables.notes: Selected parent/shareholder equity to keep BE exclusive of non-controlling interests.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet label for minority interest / NCI.
Equivalent balance-sheet label; good fallback if terminology changes.
Income statement allocation item, not the balance-sheet minority equity stock.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement comprehensive-income allocation, not balance-sheet minority interest.

variables.notes: Priority list of balance-sheet NCI labels; excluded income-statement minority allocation lines.
